title: Hillary Mack
compiled_truth: Hillary Mack is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-11 to 2001-12-06), Hillary Mack sent 2 and received 208 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (2).
